overall.description: Cinematic game engine footage of a grand circular library interior with a starry domed ceiling, featuring Gothic wooden architecture, a central monument, and candlelit tables. A lone NPC walks through the background in this atmospheric, static observation shot.

segments.scene_description: A static cinematic view of a grand circular library hall dominated by a starry glass dome ceiling. The space features Gothic wooden architecture with a central dark monument, candlelit reading tables in the foreground, and an ornate carpet. A lone NPC walks slowly through the distant archway in the background, adding subtle life to the atmospheric, dimly lit interior.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot presents a static, cinematic observation of a grand circular library that maintains a mood of scholarly solitude and celestial wonder. It begins with a wide view of the dimly lit interior, where candlelit reading tables and an ornate carpet anchor the foreground. As the eye moves deeper into the space, the Gothic wooden architecture frames a central dark monument beneath the vast expanse of a starry glass dome ceiling. The scene remains poised in stillness before a lone NPC slowly walks through a distant archway in the background, adding a subtle layer of life to the atmospheric hall.
